description: Feishu Card JSON 2.0 template for Lumen local auto scan. Render this template from scan-result.json before sending. Do not send this file directly while placeholders remain.

placeholders.finding_title: Missing ownership validation in user profile update
placeholders.impact: Authenticated users can update another user's profile.
placeholders.trigger: Authenticated user calls PATCH /api/users/{id} with another user ID.
placeholders.suggestion: Validate ownership before the write operation.

rendering_rules: Use schema 2.0 and put elements under card.body.elements.
Render the card header title as: 🔎 <product.name> — Code Quality & Security Scan Report, using product.name from config/common.json.
Choose header.template as red when High findings exist, orange when only Medium findings exist, green when only Low or no findings exist, and grey when the scan failed.
Render exactly one summary card per scan run.
Do not include local PDF paths or PDF buttons.
Do not include Repository Results section.
Do not include PR Created in Overall Summary.
Render the PR line only for High findings with an actual PR URL.
Omit the PR line for Medium and Low findings.
Put File, Code Snippet, and Suggestion only inside the collapsed View detail panel.
Use inline code snippets only. Do not use fenced code blocks.
Escape markdown-sensitive user content before rendering.
Do not include an 'Open tracked issues' count in the Overall Summary.
Do not include an 'Issue:' id/status line inside individual findings.

title.content: 🔎 Lumen — Code Quality & Security Scan Report

no_findings.content: **Findings:** No confirmed High, Medium, or Low findings were detected in this scan window.
